impact: This gives the PP&D daemon an early, isolated failure point for malformed Python in `ppd.extraction.solar_permit_requirements` before broader solar permit requirement validation runs.
summary: Add a syntax-first import sentinel for the solar permit requirements extractor and a narrow test that compiles and imports only that module.
target_task: Task checkbox-76: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.solar_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad solar requirement validation resumes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
